CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-18-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Joinder And Joinder Of Pacific Gas And Electric Co. In B&Amp;L Farms Motion To Change Venue
Off Calendar Jun-15-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Adam Stirrup of Baradat & Paboojian, Inc. telephone number 559-431-5366 appeared by telephone for Plaintiff Bryan Cantrell.
Stephan Barber of Ropers, Majeski, Kohn & Bentley telephone number 408-287-6262 appeared by telephone for Defendant B & L Farms.
Timothy Ryan of The Ryan Law Group telephone number 916-924-1912 for Defendant Pacific Gas & Electric Company.
John Thyken of Clapp, Moroney, Bellagamba, Vucinich, Bemman & Scheley telephone number 650-989-5400 for Defendant Kyle Sanders Farms.

DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY'S Joinder in Motion To Change Venue is off calendar in light of the ruling on the motion sought to be joined.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Change Venue Ccp Section 397c
Off Calendar Jun-15-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Adam Stirrup of Baradat & Paboojian, Inc. telephone number 559-431-5366 appeared by telephone for Plaintiff Bryan Cantrell.
Stephan Barber of Ropers, Majeski, Kohn & Bentley telephone number 408-287-6262 appeared by telephone for Defendant B & L Farms.
Timothy Ryan of The Ryan Law Group telephone number 916-924-1912 for Defendant Pacific Gas & Electric Company.
John Thyken of Clapp, Moroney, Bellagamba, Vucinich, Bemman & Scheley telephone number 650-989-5400 for Defendant Kyle Sanders Farms.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court confirmed its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT B&L FARMS' Motion To Change Venue, C.C.P. Section 397c is granted. The case is transferred to Merced County. B & L Farms shall pay all transfer fees. This motion was filed within a reasonable time, especially since there is no trial date. The convenience of witnesses and ends of justice strongly support transferring this case to Merced County. Based on the Barber declaration and attached exhibits, it can be reasonably inferred that many of the medical provider witnesses live in the Merced County vicinity and it would be inconvenient for them to travel to San Francisco for the trial. (J.C. Millett Co. v. Latchford-Marble Glass Co. (1959) 167 Cal.App.2d 218, 227). Plaintiff's evidentiary objections are overruled. In addition, the medical provider declarations submitted by defendant Kyle Sanders Farms further show the inconvenience of the witnesses. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

Joinder To B L Farms Motion To Change Venue

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
